ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the state where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the district governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the block is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the block */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the block in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mouzas" (
  "mouza_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouza */,
  "mouza_name" TEXT /* Name of the mouza */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block where the mouza is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the mouza */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the mouza in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mouza_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mouzas_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_name" TEXT /* Full name of the beneficiary */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the beneficiary */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the beneficiary */,
  "mouza_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mouza where the beneficiary is located */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the beneficiary */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the beneficiary */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the beneficiary */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the beneficiary */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the beneficiary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_mouza_id FOREIGN KEY ("mouza_id") REFERENCES mouzas ("mouza_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stalls" (
  "stall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stall */,
  "stall_number" TEXT /* Number or identifier of the stall */,
  "mouza_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mouza where the stall is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stall (e.g., available, allocated, distributed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location of the stall (e.g., GPS coordinates) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the stall in square meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the stall (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stalls_mouza_id FOREIGN KEY ("mouza_id") REFERENCES mouzas ("mouza_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_stalls" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary */,
  "stall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stall allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the stall was allocated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation needs to be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_stalls_stall_id FOREIGN KEY ("stall_id") REFERENCES stalls ("stall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_stalls_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade or activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade or activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trade (e.g., handicrafts, textiles) */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Demand for the trade in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_trades" (
  "beneficiary_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary-trade relationship */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the beneficiary started the trade */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the beneficiary ended the trade (if applicable) */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the beneficiary in the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_trades_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., material, tool, training) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, allocated, used) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the resource per unit */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_resources" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the resource is allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_resources_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the training program (e.g., skill development, entrepreneurship) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_training" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the beneficiary enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the beneficiary completed the program (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Whether a certificate was issued to the beneficiary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_training_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiary_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, online) */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data entry, beneficiary) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., beneficiary, stall, trade) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
